excluded: a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
a claim that all possible redesigned targets have failed
supported: no-submit screen of the existing frozen fixed-width packet surface after archiving the current IBM run
evidence for whether any existing provider/seed pair can reopen the hardware path under IBM-informed primary noise
decision support for moving from run selection to target/circuit redesign

next_gate: If no existing-surface reopen candidate is found, the next progress path is target/circuit redesign rather than selecting another already frozen lane.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
